vocab.example: Engaging in arts and crafts as a young boy really helped nurture my creativity and fine-tune my imagination.

vocab.meaning: sự gắng sức/vận động thể chất
vocab.example: I was a very active child, and I craved any activity that involved a high degree of physical exertion.

vocab.meaning: sự thể hiện không bị gò bó/tự do
vocab.example: Drama classes provided a platform for uninhibited expression, allowing me to explore different characters.
The local courtyard was the perfect hub for communal play, where we organized elaborate games of tag.

vocab.meaning: sự tò mò về trí tuệ/ham học hỏi
vocab.example: My father always encouraged my intellectual curiosity by buying me complex LEGO sets to assemble.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc phiêu lưu/hành động ngoài trời
vocab.example: My childhood was a series of outdoor exploits, ranging from building treehouses to exploring nearby creeks.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Learning a musical instrument at a young age helped instil discipline and patience in me.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển thong dong/vô tư
vocab.example: Flying kites on a windy afternoon was a carefree pastime that I looked forward to every weekend.
Team sports were vital for my social integration, teaching me how to collaborate effectively with my peers.

vocab.meaning: khả năng nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Playing with building blocks significantly improved my spatial awareness and problem-solving abilities.
